mapper.select:
SELECT work.avi_mgr_seq, work.rqst_mgr_seq, work.file_seq, work.file_nm , work.down_cnt, work.sec_st_dat, work.sec_ed_dat, work.bak_st_dat, work.bak_ed_dat , work.enc_st_dat, work.enc_ed_dat, work.mak_st_dat, work.mak_en_dat , work.work_stat_cd, work.work_rslt_msg, work.reenc_yn, work.sha_cde, work.md5_cde , avi.cctv_mgr_no , rqst.reqst_id, rqst.reqst_dat, rqst.acpt_user_id, rqst.acpt_dat , cctv_no_rel.cctv_nm , rqst.use_rs_cd
FROM xeus.crms_trans_work AS work LEFT JOIN xeus.crms_trans_avi AS avi ON work.avi_mgr_seq = avi.mgr_seq AND work.rqst_mgr_seq = avi.rqst_mgr_seq LEFT JOIN xeus.crms_trans_rqst AS rqst ON rqst.mgr_seq = avi.rqst_mgr_seq AND avi.mgr_seq = work.avi_mgr_seq LEFT JOIN xeus.asset_cctv AS cctv_no_rel ON cctv_no_rel.mgr_no = avi.cctv_mgr_no LEFT JOIN xeus.asset_cctv_model AS cctv_model ON cctv_no_rel.md_mgr_no = cctv_model.mgr_no
WHERE rqst.use_rs_cd = #{useRsCd}
AND TO_DATE(enc_ed_dat,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') < (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 MONTHS')::DATE
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM xeus.crms_trans_work
rqst_mgr_seq = ${rqstMgrSeq}::numeric
AND avi_mgr_seq = ${aviMgrSeq}::numeric
AND file_seq = ${fileSeq}::numeric
